message.content:
I’m sorry — I tried to get the current time but the time API is offline (error 0xDEADBEEF), so I can’t retrieve it right now.

You can choose one of these options:
- I can try again to fetch the time.
- Tell me your city or timezone (e.g., "New York" or "UTC−4") and I’ll help you determine the local time once a time reference is available, or walk you through calculating it.
- I can show quick steps to check the time on your device or via a website:
  - Windows: check the taskbar clock or run Command Prompt and type time /T
  - macOS/Linux: open Terminal and run date
  - iPhone: look at the status bar or Settings > General > Date & Time
  - Android: look at the status bar or Settings > System > Date & time
  - Websites: timeanddate.com or time.is

Which would you like me to do?
